'''R2-D609''', also known as '''Thirteen''', was [[Kell Tainer]]'s [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]] during [[Wraith Squadron]]'s initial training until the battle with [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Apwar Trigit]]'s [[Implacable (Star Destroyer)/Legends|''Implacable'']] over [[Ession]]. Thirteen was named such because of a programming error that made Thirteen respond to every query for a random number with 13. [[Eurrsk Thri'ag|Grinder Thri'ag]], the Wraiths' computer specialist, fixed this error, but Kell kept the [[Droid/Legends|droid's]] name. The astromech seemed to like the name, as it implied the droid was the thirteenth member of Wraith Squadron. The computing problem made a recurrence when Thirteen was hit by an empion mine, wiping its memory. Thirteen was destroyed with Kell's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] when Kell ejected after being shot down over Ession.
